name: Jian Yong | Shu
description:
Liu Bei’s first strategist. 

Dynasty Warriors/Historical Original Mashup

~

You know, if a man is gutsy enough to carry a bench onto the battlefield, maybe you shouldn’t run headfirst for him.

~

I’m gonna level with you, this is entirely self-indulgent.  I just made a public non-tailored copy for y’all to have in case you wanted it. My Shu OC is his daughter and I like writing them scheming together hee hee hee haw

Enjoy this bonus bot! I may make other generic DW characters (if they've got good art I can use lol) into bots as like a side thing. The two people who requested Ma Teng- I see you!!

Mild warnings for how this is literally taking place in a brutal, sexist, chaotic wartime period.
creator: Clementine00
